name: omarchy_gaming
content:
Gaming 
Omarchy isn't just for pRoDUcTiVItY, it's aso for having fun, and what's more fun than
gaming? Two of the best options for paying games on Omarchy are Steam (modern
games) and Retroarch (retro games).
Thanks to Vave's incredibe work on the proton compatibiity ayer, there are now tens of
thousands of payabe modern games on Linux. Oh, and did you know that the Steam
Deck actuay runs Arch!
Steam 
Insta Steam by seecting Insta > Gaming > Steam from the Omarchy menu (Super +
Alt + Space).
Make sure you pick the packages made for your GPU! If you're on an AMD with an iGPU,
just pick the first package. Otherwise there are options for Nvidia and Radeon.)
After you've instaed it, you' be abe to aunch Steam with Super + Space  and typing
steam .
Note that Steam can take 1020 seconds to start up, and it's not going to provide any
visua feedback that it's oading.
RetroArch 
Insta RetroArch by seecting Insta > Gaming > RetroArch from the Omarchy menu
(Super + Alt + Space).
After you've instaed it, you' be abe to aunch Retroarch with Super + Space  and typing
retro .
If you want to run RetroArch in fuscreen, best to just aunch it with retroarch ��
fullscreen from a termina.
Minecraft 
Gaming · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/71/gaming
1 of 2 2/2/26, 1:25 AM

---

Insta Minecraft by seecting Insta > Gaming > Minecraft from the Omarchy menu
(Super + Alt + Space).
Like Steam, note that it can take a whie after ogging in or starting up for the next screen
to appear, and you're not going to get any feedback whie you're waiting.
Xbox Controers 
Insta support for Xbox controers by seecting Insta > Xbox Controers from the
Omarchy menu (Super + Alt + Space). You' need to restart your system after the
instaation. Then you can pair the controers via buetooth and have them working in a
games.
